source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH FirstAppID as (
	SELECT 
		a.LeadID,
		MIN(a.AppointmentID) AS MinAppointmentID,
		MAX(a.SetDate) as MaxSetDate,
		MIN(a.SetDate) as MinSetDate
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT AS a
	GROUP BY a.LeadID
),
FirstSetBy as (
	SELECT DISTINCT
		LeadID,
		FIRST_VALUE(SetBy) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetBy,
		FIRST_VALUE(Concat(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName)) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetByName
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT A
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E ON A.SetBy = E.EmployeeID
),
IssuedTable as (
	SELECT 
		I.LeadID, 
		SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(I.ApptDate AS Date) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable
    FROM EDW.FACT_ISSUED_LEAD_SNAPSHOT I
	GROUP BY I.LeadID
)
SELECT 
	L.*,
	COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS ApptDateFinal,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FollowUp_Flag,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate), L.FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NULL 
         OR DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE)) < 0
		THEN NULL
		ELSE DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE))
	END AS total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, EntryDate, FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Entry_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		 WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS Flag_1_or_2_Reps_Per_Lead,
	CAST(L.EntryDate AS DATE) AS EntryDate_only_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN NULL ELSE L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS SalesRep1_ID_Clean,
	COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) AS EverSat_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) END AS Demo_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverIssued, 0) as EverIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as EverNetIssue_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS EverNetIssue_with_Rep,
	FA.MinAppointmentID AS First_AppointmentID,
	SB.FirstSetByName as First_SetBy_Agent_Name,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as GrossIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.Issued, 0) as Issued_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS Net_Issue_Flag,
	COALESCE(EverSet, 0) AS Set_Flag,
	CONCAT(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName) AS SalesRep_Full_Name,
	CASE WHEN L.LeadID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Raw_Lead,
	CASE WHEN R.Rank = 'Rehash' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS Rehash_Flag,
	FA.MaxSetDate AS SetDateMax,
	CAST(FA.MaxSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMax_Date,
	FA.MinSetDate AS SetDateMin,
	CAST(FA.MinSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMin_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NOT NULL
         AND (
                CASE 
                    WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0'
                         OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-'
                        THEN 0
                    ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0)
                END
             ) = 0
		THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS UnIssued_Lead_flag,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) = L.EntryDate THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS Same_day,
	I.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable


FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT L
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT LeadID, ContractDate FROM  EDW.FACT_JOB_SNAPSHOT) Job ON L.LeadID = Job.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstAppID FA ON L.LeadID = FA.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstSetBy SB ON L.LeadID = SB.LeadID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT E ON L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_RANK_SNAPSHOT R ON L.RankID = R.RankID
LEFT JOIN IssuedTable I ON L.LeadID = I.LeadID

WITH FirstAppID as (
	SELECT 
		a.LeadID,
		MIN(a.AppointmentID) AS MinAppointmentID,
		MAX(a.SetDate) as MaxSetDate,
		MIN(a.SetDate) as MinSetDate
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT AS a
	WHERE ApptDate IS NOT NULL
	GROUP BY a.LeadID
),
FirstSetBy as (
	SELECT DISTINCT
		LeadID,
		FIRST_VALUE(SetBy) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetBy,
		FIRST_VALUE(Concat(RTRIM(LTRIM(E.FirstName)), ' ', RTRIM(LTRIM(E.LastName)))) OVER(PARTITION BY LeadID ORDER BY AppointmentID ASC) AS FirstSetByName
	FROM EDW.FACT_APPOINTMENT_SNAPSHOT A
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT E ON A.SetBy = E.EmployeeID
	WHERE ApptDate IS NOT NULL
),
IssuedTable as (
	SELECT 
		I.LeadID, 
		SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(I.ApptDate AS Date) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable
    FROM EDW.FACT_ISSUED_LEAD_SNAPSHOT I
	GROUP BY I.LeadID
),
DSO_FINAL AS (
SELECT 
	L.LeadID,
	COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS ApptDateFinal,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FollowUp_Flag,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate), L.FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NULL 
         OR DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE)) < 0
		THEN NULL
		ELSE DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE))
	END AS total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, EntryDate, FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Entry_to_FollowUp_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		 WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep2_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS Flag_1_or_2_Reps_Per_Lead,
	CAST(L.EntryDate AS DATE) AS EntryDate_only_Date,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN NULL ELSE L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END AS SalesRep1_ID_Clean,
	COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) AS EverSat_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) END AS Demo_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverIssued, 0) as EverIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as EverNetIssue_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS EverNetIssue_with_Rep,
	FA.MinAppointmentID AS First_AppointmentID,
	SB.FirstSetByName as First_SetBy_Agent_Name,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as GrossIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.Issued, 0) as Issued_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS Net_Issue_Flag,
	COALESCE(EverSet, 0) AS Set_Flag,
	CONCAT(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName) AS SalesRep_Full_Name,
	CASE WHEN L.LeadID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Raw_Lead,
	CASE WHEN R.Rank = 'Rehash' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS Rehash_Flag,
	FA.MaxSetDate AS SetDateMax,
	CAST(FA.MaxSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMax_Date,
	FA.MinSetDate AS SetDateMin,
	CAST(FA.MinSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMin_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NOT NULL
         AND (
                CASE 
                    WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0'
                         OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-'
                        THEN 0
                    ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0)
                END
             ) = 0
		THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS UnIssued_Lead_flag,
	CASE 
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) = L.EntryDate THEN 1
		ELSE 0
	END AS Same_day,
	I.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable


FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD_SNAPSHOT L
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT LeadID, ContractDate FROM  EDW.FACT_JOB_SNAPSHOT) Job ON L.LeadID = Job.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstAppID FA ON L.LeadID = FA.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstSetBy SB ON L.LeadID = SB.LeadID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE_SNAPSHOT E ON L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_RANK_SNAPSHOT R ON L.RankID = R.RankID
LEFT JOIN IssuedTable I ON L.LeadID = I.LeadID
)

SET A1.ApptDateFinal = A2.ApptDateFinal,

DSO_FINAL AS (
SELECT 
	L.LeadID,
	COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS ApptDateFinal,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FollowUp_Flag,
	CASE WHEN L.FollowUpDate IS NOT NULL THEN DateDiff(day, COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate), L.FollowUpDate) END AS total_Days_Appt_to_FollowUp_Date,

		THEN NULL
		ELSE DATEDIFF(day, CAST(EntryDate AS DATE), CAST(COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) AS DATE))
	END AS total_Days_Entry_to_Appointment,

	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverSat, 0) END AS Demo_Flag,

	SB.FirstSetByName as First_SetBy_Agent_Name,
	COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) as GrossIssue_Flag,
	COALESCE(L.Issued, 0) as Issued_Flag,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.[SalesRep1_EmployeeID], 1) = '-' THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(L.EverNetIssued, 0) END AS Net_Issue_Flag,
	COALESCE(EverSet, 0) AS Set_Flag,
	LTRIM(RTRIM(CONCAT(E.FirstName, ' ', E.LastName))) AS SalesRep_Full_Name,
	CASE WHEN L.LeadID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Raw_Lead,
	CASE WHEN R.Rank = 'Rehash' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS Rehash_Flag,
	FA.MaxSetDate AS SetDateMax,
	CAST(FA.MaxSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMax_Date,
	FA.MinSetDate AS SetDateMin,
	CAST(FA.MinSetDate AS Date) AS SetDateMin_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 2) = '-0' OR RIGHT(L.SalesRep1_EmployeeID, 1) = '-' THEN 0
		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) IS NOT NULL

		WHEN COALESCE(Job.ContractDate, L.ApptDate) = L.EntryDate THEN 1
		ELSE 0

	I.NetIssue_total_from_IssuedTable


FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD L
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT LeadID, ContractDate FROM  EDW.FACT_JOB) Job ON L.LeadID = Job.LeadID
LEFT JOIN FirstAppID FA ON L.LeadID = FA.LeadID

WITH Milestone AS (
SELECT 
	JobID,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-T' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarFHIT,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-M' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-M' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarFHIM,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-5' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarSWR,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'RTW-M' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarRTWM,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-M' THEN ActualDate END) as MSRvarCTAM,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarPBDO ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarFHI ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PHI-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarPHI ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarMAC ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarMXH ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarSWR ,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-O' THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarCTAO,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('RTW-E', 'RTW-O') THEN ActualDate END) as ORDvarRTW,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-V' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarMXH,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-4' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarSWR,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-5' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarPBC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('RTW-2', 'RTW-K', 'RTW-E') THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarRTW,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('FHI-V', 'FHI-Z') THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarFHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-V' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PHI-V' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarPHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-V' THEN ActualDate END) as RCVvarCTA,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarSWR,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-6' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarPBC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'RTW-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarRTW,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarFHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID IN ('MAC-K', 'MAC-S') THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PHI-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarPHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarMXH,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-S' THEN ActualDate END) as STRvarCTA,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarSWR,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarPBC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'RTW-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarRTW,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarFHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-S' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarMXH,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PHI-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarPHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-C' THEN ActualDate END) as REVvarCTA,

	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'SWR-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarSWR,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarPBC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'RTW-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarRTW,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-A' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarFHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarMXH,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PHI-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarPHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-C' THEN ActualDate END) as CPTvarCTA,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-8' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarFHI,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MAC-1' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarMAC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'MXH-A' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarMXH,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'PBC-37' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarPBC,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'CTA-E' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarCTA,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'RTW-Q' THEN ActualDate END) as IEDvarRTW,
	
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-Z' THEN ActualDate END) as PRDvarCTA,
	MAX(CASE WHEN MilestoneDateTypeID = 'FHI-H' THEN ActualDate END) as PCDvarCTA
	
FROM EDW.FACT_MILESTONE_DETAIL
WHERE ActualDate >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 4, 1, 1)
GROUP BY JobID
),
Milestone_Dates as (SELECT 
	j.JobID,
	COALESCE(m.MSRvarFHIT, m.MSRvarMAC, m.MSRvarFHIM, m.MSRvarCTAM, m.MSRvarSWR, m.MSRvarRTWM) AS MSR_Date,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.ORDvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'SWR' THEN m.ORDvarSWR
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.ORDvarPBDO
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.ORDvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.ORDvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.ORDvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.ORDvarCTAO
        WHEN j.Division = 'PHI' THEN m.ORDvarPHI
        ELSE NULL
    END AS ORD_Date,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.RCVvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'SWR' THEN m.RCVvarSWR
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.RCVvarPBC
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.RCVvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.RCVvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.RCVvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.RCVvarCTA
        WHEN j.Division = 'PHI' THEN m.RCVvarPHI
        ELSE NULL
    END AS RCV_Date,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.STRvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'SWR' THEN m.STRvarSWR
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.STRvarPBC
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.STRvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.STRvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.STRvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.STRvarCTA
        WHEN j.Division = 'PHI' THEN m.STRvarPHI
        ELSE NULL
    END AS STR_DATE,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.REVvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'SWR' THEN m.REVvarSWR
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.REVvarPBC
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.REVvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.REVvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.REVvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.REVvarCTA
        WHEN j.Division = 'PHI' THEN m.REVvarPHI
        ELSE NULL
    END AS Revenue_Date,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.CPTvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'SWR' THEN m.CPTvarSWR
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.CPTvarPBC
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.CPTvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.CPTvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.CPTvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.CPTvarCTA
        WHEN j.Division = 'PHI' THEN m.CPTvarPHI
        ELSE NULL
    END AS Complete_Date,
	CASE 
        WHEN j.Division = 'MXH' THEN m.IEDvarMXH
        WHEN j.Division = 'PBC' THEN m.IEDvarPBC
        WHEN j.Division = 'RTW' THEN m.IEDvarRTW
        WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.IEDvarFHI
        WHEN j.Division = 'MAC' THEN m.IEDvarMAC
        WHEN j.Division = 'CTA' THEN m.IEDvarCTA
        ELSE NULL
    END AS Install_End_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.PRDvarCTA
        ELSE NULL
    END AS Permit_Received_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN j.Division = 'FHI' THEN m.PCDvarCTA
        ELSE NULL
    END AS Permit_to_City_Date
	
FROM EDW.FACT_JOB j
LEFT JOIN Milestone m
	ON j.JobID = m.JobID
),
LatestStageDate as (
SELECT
    J.JobID,
    CASE
		WHEN Revenue_Date IS NOT NULL THEN Revenue_Date
		ELSE
			CASE
				WHEN ContractDate >= ISNULL(MSR_Date, ContractDate)
				 AND ContractDate >= ISNULL(ORD_Date, ContractDate)
				 AND ContractDate >= ISNULL(RCV_Date, ContractDate)
				 AND ContractDate >= ISNULL(STR_Date, ContractDate)
					THEN ContractDate

				WHEN MSR_Date >= ISNULL(ORD_Date, MSR_Date)
				 AND MSR_Date >= ISNULL(RCV_Date, MSR_Date)
				 AND MSR_Date >= ISNULL(STR_Date, MSR_Date)
					THEN MSR_Date

				WHEN ORD_Date >= ISNULL(RCV_Date, ORD_Date)
				 AND ORD_Date >= ISNULL(STR_Date, ORD_Date)
					THEN ORD_Date

				WHEN RCV_Date >= ISNULL(STR_Date, RCV_Date)
					THEN RCV_Date

				ELSE STR_Date
			END
	END AS LatestStage_Date
FROM EDW.FACT_JOB J
LEFT JOIN Milestone_Dates D ON J.JobID = D.JobID
),
fact_payment as (
	SELECT 
		JobID,
		SUM(PaymentAmount)  as Payment
	FROM EDW.FACT_JOB_PAYMENT
	WHERE PaymentDate >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()) - 4, 1, 1)
		and PaymentDate < DATEADD(DAY, DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, GETDATE()), 1)
	GROUP BY JobID
),
DSO_final as (
SELECT
	J.JobID,
	J.ContractDate,
	MD.MSR_Date,
	MD.ORD_Date,
	MD.RCV_Date,
	MD.STR_DATE,
	MD.Revenue_Date,
	MD.Install_End_Date,
	MD.Permit_Received_Date,
	MD.Permit_to_City_Date,
	MD.Complete_Date,
	LSD.LatestStage_Date,
	CASE
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = Revenue_Date THEN 'Stage 00 Installed'
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = ContractDate THEN 'Stage 0 Contract'
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = MSR_Date THEN 'Stage 1 Measure'
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = ORD_Date THEN 'Stage 2 Order'
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = RCV_Date THEN 'Stage 3 Received'
		WHEN LatestStage_Date = STR_DATE THEN 'Stage 4 Start'
    ELSE 'na'
	END AS Stage_5,
	CASE
		WHEN Revenue_Date IS NULL THEN NULL

		WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, Revenue_Date, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
			THEN 'a.0-30 days'

		WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, Revenue_Date, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 31 AND 60
			THEN 'b.31-60 days'

		WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, Revenue_Date, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 61 AND 90
			THEN 'c.61-90 days'

		WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, Revenue_Date, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 91 AND 180
			THEN 'd.91-180 days'

		WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, Revenue_Date, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 181 AND 360
			THEN 'e.181-360 days'

		ELSE 'f.361+ days'
	END AS Aging,

	RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) AS [Status],
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Backlog_Flag,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
		 WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END, 0) AS GrossSales,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '1' THEN 
		 CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
			WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS Backlog_Amount,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '5' 
		 AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
		 END AS BTD_Flag,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '5' THEN 
		 CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
			WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS BTD_Amount,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '3' 
		 AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
		 END AS Cancel_Flag,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '3' THEN 
		 CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
			WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS Cancel_Amount,
	DATEDIFF(DAY, J.ContractDate, J.StatusDate) AS Post_Contract_Days,
	CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, J.ContractDate, J.StatusDate) > 10 THEN 'After 10 Days' ELSE 'Before 10 Days' END AS Cancel_after_Contract_Date,
	CASE WHEN 
			(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '3' 
				 AND 
				 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
						WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
				 THEN 1 
				 ELSE 0 
				 END) = 1
		 OR 
			(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '5' 
				 AND 
				 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
						WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
				 THEN 1 
				 ELSE 0 
				 END) = 1
		 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, J.ContractDate, J.CancelDate)
		 ELSE 0 END AS Cancel_Days,
	ROUND(J.GrossAmount, 0) As GrossSales_inc_Taxes,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(InstallerID_1, 2) = '-0' THEN NULL ELSE InstallerID_1 END AS InstallerID_1_Clean,
	CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '2' 
		 AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
		 END AS OnHold_Flag,
	CASE WHEN MSR_Date is null then 0 else 1 end as Measured_Flag,
	CASE WHEN ORD_Date is null then 0 else 1 end as Ordered_Flag,
	fp.Payment,
	CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
		 WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 then 1 else 0 END AS Sale_Flag,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '3' OR RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '5' THEN J.GrossAmount ELSE 0 END, 0) as Tot_Cancel_amt_inc_Taxes,
	ROUND(CASE WHEN RIGHT(JS.JobStatusCategoryID, 1) = '2' THEN 
		 CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
			WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS OnHold_Amount,
	UNI_JobStatusCategory as uni_StatusCategory,


	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Backlog' 
		AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
	END AS uni_Backlog_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Backlog'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_Backlog_Amount,

	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Bank Turn Down' 
		AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
	END AS uni_BTD_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Bank Turn Down'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_BTD_Amount,

	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Cancelled' 
		AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
	END AS uni_Cancel_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Cancelled'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_Cancel_Amount,

	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Completed' 
		AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
	END AS uni_Complete_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Completed'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_Complete_Amount,
	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Prenet'  
			AND 
			(CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
			THEN 1 
			ELSE 0 END as uni_PreNet_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'Prenet'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_PreNet_Amount,

	CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'On Hold' 
		AND 
		 (CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) > 0 
		 THEN 1 
		 ELSE 0 
	END AS uni_OnHold_Flag,

	ROUND(CASE WHEN UNI_JobStatusCategory = 'On Hold'  THEN 
			CASE WHEN J.Division in ('MXH','CTA','SWR') THEN J.GrossAmount 
				WHEN J.JobNetAmt IS NOT NULL AND J.JobNetAmt > 0 THEN J.JobNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END
		 ELSE 0 
	END, 0) AS uni_OnHold_Amount,
	
	CASE WHEN MSR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN MSR_DATE AND ORD_DATE AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS MSR_to_ORD_days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN MSR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN MSR_DATE AND ORD_DATE	AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	)END)/5.0, 2) AS MSR_to_ORD_Weeks,

	CASE WHEN Complete_Date IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND Complete_Date	AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS ORD_to_Cm_days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN Complete_Date IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND Complete_Date	AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END )/5.0, 2) AS ORD_to_Cm_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND RCV_DATE AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS OR_to_RC_days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND RCV_DATE AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END )/5.0, 2) AS OR_to_RC_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN STR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND STR_DATE AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS OR_to_ST_days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN STR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND ORD_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN ORD_DATE AND STR_DATE AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END )/5.0, 2) AS OR_to_ST_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN Permit_to_City_Date IS NOT NULL AND Permit_Received_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN Permit_to_City_Date AND Permit_Received_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS PermitToCity_to_PermitReceived_Days,
	
	CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN RCV_DATE AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS RC_to_CM_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN RCV_DATE AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END )/5.0, 2) AS RC_to_CM_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND STR_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN RCV_DATE AND STR_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS RC_to_ST_days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN RCV_DATE IS NOT NULL AND STR_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN RCV_DATE AND STR_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END )/5.0, 2) AS RC_to_ST_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS Sl_to_Cm_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END)/5.0, 2) AS Sl_to_Cm_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND Revenue_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND Revenue_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS Sl_to_In_Days,
	
	CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND MSR_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND MSR_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS Sl_to_MS_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND MSR_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND MSR_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END)/5.0, 2) AS Sl_to_MS_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND ORD_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND ORD_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS Sl_to_OR_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND ORD_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND ORD_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END)/5.0, 2) AS Sl_to_OR_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND RCV_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND RCV_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS Sl_to_RC_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN J.ContractDate IS NOT NULL AND RCV_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN J.ContractDate AND RCV_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END)/5.0, 2) AS Sl_to_RC_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN STR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN STR_DATE AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS St_to_CM_Days,
	
	ROUND((CASE WHEN STR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND Complete_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN STR_DATE AND Complete_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END)/5.0, 2) AS St_to_CM_weeks,
	
	CASE WHEN STR_DATE IS NOT NULL AND Install_End_Date IS NOT NULL THEN (
		SELECT COUNT(*)
		FROM EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
		WHERE C.CalendarDate BETWEEN STR_DATE AND Install_End_Date AND C.DAY NOT IN ('Sunday', 'Saturday')
		and C.Calendardate NOT IN ('2025-01-01', '2025-05-26', '2025-07-04', '2025-09-01', '2025-11-27', '2025-11-28', '2025-12-24',
								'2025-12-25', '2025-12-31')
	) END AS St_to_Installend_Days

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB J
LEFT JOIN Milestone_Dates MD ON J.JobID = MD.JobID
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.JobStatusID = JS.JobStatusID
LEFT JOIN LatestStageDate LSD ON J.JobID = LSD.JobID 
LEFT JOIN fact_payment fp ON J.JobID = fp.JobID
)
